name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
text:
Chocolate Chip Cookies

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
4lbs butter (soft)
8 cups sugar
8 cups brown sugar
16 eggs
Vanilla
128 oz AP flour
8 tsp baking soda
8 tsp baking powder
4 tsp salt
16 cups chocolate chips
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Cream butter, sugar, and brown sugar
- Add eggs & vanilla, mix until combined
- Add flour, bs, bp, salt, and chocolate chips. Mix until just combined
- Scoop heaping GREEN scoop, 4.75 oz

name: Peanut Butter Cookies
text:
Peanut Butter Cookies

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
4lbs butter (soft)
8 cups sugar
8 cups brown sugar
100 oz peanut butter
16 eggs
Vanilla
96 oz AP flour
5 Tbsp + 1 tsp baking soda
4 tsp salt
[Procedure:]{.underline}

- Add eggs & vanilla, mix until combined
- Add flour, bs, and salt. Mix until just combined
- Scoop heaping GREEN scoop, 4.75 oz

text:

text:
Snickerdoodle Cookies

4 cups brown sugar

Vanilla

8 tsp baking soda

4 tsp salt

- Add eggs, vanilla, & lemon juice. Mix until combined
- Add flour, bs, cinnamon and salt. Mix until just combined
- Scoop heaping BLUE scoop, 3.75 oz

name: Ginger Molasses Cookies
text:
Ginger Molasses Cookies

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
2 lbs sugar
22 oz oil
4 eggs
10.7 oz molasses
2 tsp salt
3 Tbsp baking soda
2 Tbsp ginger
1 Tbsp + 1 tsp cinnamon
2 lbs 9 oz BREAD flour
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix sugar, oil, & molasses
- Add eggs, mix until combined
- Add flour, salt, bs, cinnamon, & ginger. Mix until combined
- \*keep ginger away from baking soda\*
- Scoop flat GREEN scoop

name: Hummingbird Cake
text:
Hummingbird Cake

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
2 cups sugar
3 eggs
1.5 cups oil
Vanilla
8 oz pineapple
3 ripe bananas
12 oz AP flour
1 tsp baking soda
0.5 tsp salt
1 tsp cinnamon
0.25 tsp nutmeg
0.25 tsp clove
2 oz pecans (chopped & toasted)
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix sugar, eggs, oil, vanilla, pineapple, & bananas with paddle on
  small mixer
- Fold in flour, bs, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, clove, and pecans until
  combined

name: Peanut Butter Pie
text:
Peanut Butter Pie

[Filling Ingredients:]{.underline}
8 oz cream cheese
3 oz 10x
8 oz peanut butter
8 oz heavy cream
[Crust Ingredients:]{.underline}
24 oreos
2 oz butter
[Filling Procedure:]{.underline}
- Whip heavy cream with whisk attachment until stiff peaks
- In separate bowl, mix cream cheese, 10x, and peanut butter with paddle
  attachment until smooth
- Fold whipped cream into peanut butter mix
[Crust Procedure:]{.underline}
- Food process oreos into crumbs. Add butter until wet enough to press
  into the pie pan.
- Bake crust 7-9 minutes, or until it smells chocolatey and done
Once crust is cooled, add filling and smooth with offset spatula. Top
with ganache drizzle & peanut butter candies. Refrigerate pie!

name: GF Brownies
text:
GF Brownies

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
12 oz butter
3 lb chocolate chips
3 cups sugar
12 eggs
vanilla
6 oz corn starch
4 oz cocoa powder
1 tsp cinnamon
0.75 tsp salt
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Melt butter & chocolate in glass bowl in microwave, 3:30. Pour into
  small mixer bowl
- With paddle attachment, add sugar until combined and slightly cooled
- Add eggs and vanilla
- Add cornstarch, cocoa powder, cinnamon, salt. Mix until fully combined
- Spray and line a half sheet pan. Pour batter and spread evenly into
  pan.
- Bake 30 min. Let cool overnight, unwrapped

name: Zucchini Muffins
text:
Zucchini Muffins

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
2 large zucchini
1.5 cups sugar
1 cup brown sugar
0.5 cup oil
0.5 cup butter milk
4 eggs
vanilla
16 oz flour
2 tsp baking soda
2 tsp baking powder
1 tsp salt
2 tsp cinnamon
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Grate & strain zucchinis
- Mix sugar, brown sugar, oil, buttermilk, eggs, vanilla
- Fold in flour, bs, bp, cinnamon, and salt
- Fold in zucchini
- Top muffins with streusel or brown sugar before baking

name: Apple Filling
text:
Apple Filling

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
18 apples
1.5 cups brown sugar
2 oz flour
3 Tbsp cinnamon
0.75 tsp clove
0.75 tsp nutmeg
1 oz lemon juice
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Peel and cut apples in thin slices
- Coat with brown sugar, flour, cinnamon, clove, nutmeg, and lemon juice
- Cook on low heat, until slightly soft. Stir often

name: Coconut Macaroons
text:
Coconut Macaroons

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
3 lb 5 oz shredded coconut
6 oz egg whites
2 cans sweetened condensed milk
0.5 oz vanilla
[Procedure:]{.underline}

- Heaping YELLOW scoop
- Bake 7 min, turn, 3 more minutes (or until golden)

name: Chocolate Cake
text:
Chocolate Cake

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
3 cups sugar
10 oz flour

2.25 tsp baking soda
2.25 tsp baking powder

Vanilla

- Add in milk, oil, eggs & vanilla. Mix
- Mix in coffee last

[Procedure:]{.underline}

- Add oil, buttermilk, eggs, red color, vanilla and vinegar

name: Vanilla Cake
text:
Vanilla Cake

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
6 eggs
3 cups sugar
Vanilla
12 oz flour
1 Tbsp baking powder
0.5 tsp salt
1.5 cups milk
0.5 cup oil
3 oz butter
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Combine milk, oil and butter in a glass pyrex. Microwave 3:30 or until
  completely melted
- Mix eggs, sugar and vanilla VERY WELL. They should be light in color
  and full of volume.
- Add flour, baking powder and salt. Mix lightly, until just combined
- Pour hot milk/oil/butter mix on top. Whisk until combined.

name: Coffee Cake
text:
Coffee Cake

**Crumb Top**
[Ingredients:]{.underline}
4 c Brown Sugar
25 oz flour
4 Tbsp cinnamon
1 tsp salt
12 oz (melted) butter
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix until just combined, no visible dryness
**Cake**
[Ingredients:]{.underline}
6 oz butter
3 cups sugar
4 eggs
2.5 cups buttermilk
1 Tbsp vanilla
0.5 tsp lemon
25 oz flour
1 tsp baking powder
2 tsp baking soda
1 tsp salt
[Procedure]{.underline}
- Cream butter, sugar, vanilla and lemon
- Add eggs (mix until very light & fluffy)
- Mix flour, powder, soda and salt in a separate bowl
- Alternate flour mix & buttermilk
Put fruit filling between cake and cake

name: Pistachio Cake
text:
Pistachio Cake

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
4 oz oil
4 oz soft butter
10.5 oz sugar
2 eggs
2 egg whites
2 tsp vanilla
0.5 tsp almond extract
6 oz buttermilk
6 oz milk
7 oz ground pistachio
10 oz flour
0.5 tsp salt
0.5 tsp baking soda
1 Tbsp baking powder
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Whisk oil and butter
- Add sugar, mix on high until light in color
- Add eggs, whites, almond and vanilla extract. Whisk
- Slowly whisk in milk and buttermilk
- Fold in pistachios, flour, salt, soda and powder

name: Rice Krispies
text:
Rice Krispies

To make full pan, x2 this recipe
[Ingredients:]{.underline}
20 oz marshmallows
4 oz butter
12 cups rice cereal
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Microwave marshmallows and butter 3 minutes 30 seconds
- Put rice cereal in large bowl
- Stir marshmallow mix before adding to cereal
- Stir cereal and marshmallow mix. Dump into pan in thin layer -DO NOT
  PRESS-
> You will press down after 2nd batch

- Creaming method

Dog Treats

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
7 ½ cups whole wheat flour
6 eggs
1 ½ cups pumpkin
6 Tbsp Peanut butter
1 tsp salt
1 ½ tsp cinnamon
1-2 Tbsp water
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix in mixer with paddle attachment until dough is formed. Roll out to

- Score dot in center, bake until firm

name: Cinnamon Rolls
text:
Cinnamon Rolls

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
24 oz milk
7.35 oz sugar
4 eggs
4 egg yolks
8 oz butter, melted
52 oz AP Flour
Salt
1 oz yeast
[Filling:]{.underline}
1 lb soft butter
2 cups brown sugar
6 tbsp cinnamon
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix with dough hook 7-8 minutes
- Roll out dough 40"x18"
- Smear filling over entire dough, roll up & trim edges.
- Cut into even 24 pieces

name: Lemon Curd
text:
Lemon Curd

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
2 cups
1 ⅓ cups lemon juice
16 egg yolks
½ tsp salt
10 oz butter
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Whisk ingredients over a double boiler until thickened.

name: Pate A Choux
text:
Pate A Choux

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
4 cups water
1# butter
Salt
20 oz flour
16 eggs
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Heat water, butter, salt until boiling.
- Add flour and mix with a wooden spoon.
- Cook on low heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
- Mix dough with paddle attachment until cool.
- Add eggs, a few at a time until combined.

name: Lemon Bars
text:
Lemon Bars

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
[Crust:]{.underline}
12 oz butter, pretty soft
3.5 oz 10x sugar
12 oz flour
vanilla
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix butter, sugar and flour until combined.
- Evenly press into half sheet pans with parchment paper.
[Filling: 1 half sheet pan]{.underline}
31 oz sugar
7.5 oz flour
9 eggs
1 ½ cups lemon juice
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Combine sugar and flour.
- Add eggs and mix SLIGHTLY.
- Add lemon juice and mix just until combined.
- DO NOT OVERMIX.

name: German Topping
text:
German Topping

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
2 cups sugar
2 cups milk
6 egg yolks
8 oz butter
5 cups coconut
3 cups toasted pecans
Vanilla
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Combine sugar, milk, yolks and butter in a pot and cook until
  thickened.
- Pour over coconut, pecans and vanilla and mix until combined.

name: Gingerbread Bundt
text:
Gingerbread Bundt

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
1200 g flour
1276 g brown sugar
2 Tbsp cinnamon
4 tsp nutmeg
2 tsp clove
3 Tbsp + 1 tsp ginger
Salt
1 tsp baking soda
4 tsp baking powder
680 g butter, melted
8 eggs
680 g molasses
900g hot coffee
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, clove, ginger, salt, b soda
  & b powder well
- Add in butter, eggs, & molasses until just mixed
- Mix in hot coffee

name: Biscotti
text:
Biscotti

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
1# 8oz Butter, soft
3# sugar
1 Tbsp cinnamon (or other spices)
3 Tbsp vanilla ( or other flavoring)
18 Eggs
5# 4 oz flour
3 oz baking powder
18 oz nuts
18 oz fruit-dry
\*can sub nuts or fruit with chocolate or white chips
[Mixing Procedure:]{.underline}
-Cream Butter and sugar until smooth and pale in colour
-SCRAPE-
-Add Cinnamon (or other spices) and vanilla (or other flavoring)
-mix until incorporated
-Add 3-4 eggs at a time, mix until incorporated. Continue this process
until eggs are gone.
-SCRAPE-
-Add Flour and baking powder, mix until it starts to combined
\- Add Nuts and Fruit. Mix until incorporated
[Scaling Procedure]{.underline}
\- scale at 2#5oz each you should have a total of 6 \*this weight could
vary depending on what nuts and fruit are used\*
-once scaled you will form a log 12" long, 5"wide, 1" thick. wrap in
plastic wrap and refrigerate. \* needs to chill for 2 hours before
baking
[Baking Procedure]{.underline}
-full sheet pan with liner, spray lightly. With the pan horizontal,
place 2 longs about 6-7 inches apart leaving a 3-4 inch space from the
edge.
-place forks or knives in corners to keep the paper from blowing up.
-in bowel mix half cup sugar and heavy cream to make a paste, spread
over both logs
-Bake 35-4o minutes or until the center has puffed up.
\- let cool completely
-slice 1" and let sit overnight in a closed oven.

name: Carrot Cake
text:
Carrot Cake

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
36 Eggs
72 oz Oil
36 oz Buttermilk
7lb 2 oz Sugar
1062 g Brown Sugar
84 oz Flour
4T + 1.5 t B.Powder
3T B. Soda
3T Salt
3T Cinnamon
1T + 1.5t Ginger
1T + 1.5t Nutmeg
1.5t Clove
9lbs Carrots, finely processed
1, 125g Pineapple
30 oz Pecans, toasted & chopped
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix eggs, oil, buttermilk, sugar, brown sugar
- Add flour, b power, b soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, cloves
- Fold in carrots, pineapple, pecans

name: Pound Cake
text:
Pound Cake

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
1 lb butter, soft
21 oz sugar
vanilla
6 eggs
16 oz flour
1 tsp b. powder
6 oz milk
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Cream butter, sugar, and vanilla
- Add eggs
- Alternate flour/b.powder with milk

name: Pumpkin Cake
text:
Pumpkin Cake

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
1041 g Sugar
894 g Flour
1T Salt
1T + 1.5t B. Powder
1T +1.5t B. Soda
3T Pumpkin Spice
6 eggs
681 g Buttermilk
255 g Milk
1062 g Pumpkin
297 g Oil
(Crumb Top)
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Mix sugar, flour, salt, powder, soda, pumpkin spice in a bowl
- Add in eggs, buttermilk, milk, pumpkin, oil. Mix well
- Once in pans, top with 5 oz of crumb top to each cake

name: Chocolate Bourbon Pecan Pie
text:
Chocolate Bourbon Pecan Pie

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
3 eggs
7 oz sugar
1.5 oz melted butter
Vanilla
1t nutmeg
4 oz corn syrup
2 oz bourbon
7 oz chocolate chips
6 oz pecans
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Layer chocolate chips & pecans into an egg washed pie shell
- Mix eggs, sugar, melted butter, vanilla, nutmeg, corn syrup, bourbon
- Pour mix (17oz) into prepared pie shell
- Bake 45 minutes

name: Blueberry Filling
text:
Blueberry Filling

[Ingredients:]{.underline}
5lbs frozen wild maine blueberries
17.5 oz sugar
4 oz corn starch
1 oz lemon juice
[Procedure:]{.underline}
- Cook on stove until thickened and boiling
